Title: Account Menu - Purchasing Group Structure
Preconditions: User logged in with account access; storefront account section accessible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Log in with valid credentials
[NAV] Navigate to account section via user icon or 'My Account' link
[ASSERT] Left rail navigation menu visible
[ASSERT] 'Purchasing' group header visible
[ASSERT] 'Dashboard' link present under Purchasing
[ASSERT] 'Orders' link present under Purchasing
[ASSERT] 'Lists' link present under Purchasing
[ASSERT] 'Saved for Later' link present under Purchasing
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Purchasing' group label visible in left rail
[DOM] 'Dashboard' link present under Purchasing
[DOM] 'Orders' link present under Purchasing
[DOM] 'Lists' link present under Purchasing
[DOM] 'Saved for Later' link present under Purchasing
[DOM] Items appear in correct order
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] Account page loads with HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Account page inaccessible after login; Purchasing group missing; any expected link absent; console TypeError

Title: Account Menu - User Group Structure
Preconditions: User logged in; personal account (without org)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Log in with valid personal account credentials
[NAV] Navigate to account section
[ASSERT] Left rail navigation menu visible
[ASSERT] 'User' group header visible
[ASSERT] 'Profile' link present under User
[ASSERT] 'Addresses' link present under User (personal accounts only)
[ASSERT] 'Change Password' link present under User
[ASSERT] 'Saved Credit Cards' link present under User
Assertions:
[DOM] 'User' group label visible in left rail
[DOM] 'Profile' link under User group
[DOM] 'Addresses' link under User group (personal account only)
[DOM] 'Change Password' link under User group
[DOM] 'Saved Credit Cards' link under User group
Failure_Signals: User group header missing; any expected link absent; Addresses link visible for org user (known expected behavior: hidden for B2B); console TypeError

Title: Account Menu - Group Headers Are Non-Clickable
Preconditions: User logged in; account menu visible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to account section after login
[ACT] Click on 'Purchasing' group header text
[ASSERT] No navigation occurs
[ACT] Click on 'User' group header text
[ASSERT] No navigation occurs
[ASSERT] Cursor style on group headers is default (not pointer)
Assertions:
[STATE] Clicking 'Purchasing' header does not navigate
[STATE] Clicking 'User' header does not navigate
[DOM] Group header cursor style is 'default' not 'pointer'
[DOM] Group headers have no href or are not <a> elements
Failure_Signals: Group header click triggers navigation; headers styled as links with pointer cursor; console TypeError

Title: Account Menu - All Navigation Items Route Correctly
Preconditions: User logged in; account menu visible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to account section after login
[ACT] Click 'Dashboard' under Purchasing
[ASSERT] Dashboard page loads
[ACT] Click 'Orders' under Purchasing
[ASSERT] Order History page loads
[ACT] Click 'Lists' under Purchasing
[ASSERT] Lists page loads
[ACT] Click 'Saved for Later' under Purchasing
[ASSERT] Saved for Later page loads
[ACT] Click 'Profile' under User
[ASSERT] Profile page loads
[ACT] Click 'Addresses' under User
[ASSERT] Addresses page loads
[ACT] Click 'Change Password' under User
[ASSERT] Change Password page loads
[ACT] Click 'Saved Credit Cards' under User
[ASSERT] Saved Credit Cards page loads
Assertions:
[NAV] Each menu item routes to its correct page
[DOM] Page heading or title confirms correct destination for each
[DOM] Left rail navigation remains visible after each navigation
[DOM] Active item is highlighted on destination page
Failure_Signals: Any menu item routes to wrong page; 404 or /error page after click; left rail disappears after navigation; console TypeError

Title: Account Menu - Active State Highlighting
Preconditions: User logged in; navigating between account pages
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to account section after login
[ACT] Click 'Orders' in Purchasing group
[ASSERT] 'Orders' item is highlighted/active in left rail
[ASSERT] Other items are not highlighted
[ACT] Click 'Profile' in User group
[ASSERT] 'Profile' item is now highlighted
[ASSERT] 'Orders' item is no longer highlighted
Assertions:
[DOM] Active item has distinct visual style (bold; border; or background)
[DOM] Only one menu item is active at a time
[STATE] Active state updates correctly on each navigation
Failure_Signals: Multiple items highlighted simultaneously; active state not updating after navigation; no visual distinction for active item; console TypeError

Title: Account Menu - Mobile Responsive Layout
Preconditions: Mobile viewport set to 375x667; user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Set browser viewport to 375x667 pixels
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Log in with valid credentials
[NAV] Navigate to account section
[ASSERT] Account menu accessible on mobile (hamburger; drawer; or tabs)
[ACT] Open mobile menu
[ASSERT] Purchasing and User group structures visible
[ACT] Navigate to 'Orders' via mobile menu
[ASSERT] Orders page loads correctly on mobile
Assertions:
[DOM] Account menu accessible on 375px viewport
[DOM] Grouped structure (Purchasing; User) maintained on mobile
[DOM] Touch targets minimum 44x44px
[STATE] Mobile menu opens and closes correctly
[NAV] Navigation from mobile menu routes correctly
Failure_Signals: Account menu inaccessible on mobile; group structure lost on mobile; touch targets below 44px; navigation from mobile menu broken; console TypeError

Title: Members Page Display
Preconditions: User logged in as company Admin or Maintainer
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Log in as company Admin or Maintainer
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members or via Company > Members in account menu
[WAIT] Wait for member list to load
Assertions:
[DOM] /company/members page loads without error
[DOM] Member list displays all company members
[DOM] Each member row shows: full name; email address; role (Buyer/Admin); status (Active/Blocked)
[STATE] Own account is visible in the list
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] GET /company/members returns HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Page returns 403 or 404; member list empty when members exist; member data columns missing; console TypeError

Title: Invite Member - Buyer Role
Preconditions: Logged in as company Admin; on Members page
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in and log in as company Admin
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members
[ACT] Click 'Invite Member' button
[ACT] Fill invitation form 'Email': invite+buyer+{{timestamp}}@example.com
[ACT] Select role: 'Buyer'
[ACT] Submit the invitation form
[WAIT] Wait for success confirmation
[ASSERT] Success message shown
[ASSERT] Invited email appears as pending in member list (if applicable)
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Invite Member' button visible for Admin users
[DOM] Invitation form accepts email and role selection
[DOM] Role options include at minimum: Buyer; Admin
[DOM] Success message 'Invitation sent' or similar shown after submit
[STATE] Pending invitation visible in member list
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[EMAIL] Invited email receives invitation email
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Invite button missing for Admin; role options absent; mutation returns errors[]; no success message; console TypeError

Title: Invite Member - Admin Role
Preconditions: Logged in as company Admin; on Members page
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in and log in as company Admin
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members
[ACT] Click 'Invite Member'
[ACT] Fill invitation form 'Email': invite+admin+{{timestamp}}@example.com
[ACT] Select role: 'Admin'
[ACT] Submit invitation
[WAIT] Wait for success confirmation
[ASSERT] Invited Admin appears in member list after accepting invitation
[ASSERT] New Admin can access member management features
Assertions:
[DOM] Invitation with Admin role can be sent successfully
[STATE] After accepting: new member appears in list with 'Admin' role
[STATE] New Admin can invite others and manage members
[STATE] New Admin cannot exceed own permission scope
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[EMAIL] Invited Admin email receives invitation
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Admin role invitation blocked; mutation returns errors[]; new Admin lacks admin permissions after invite; console TypeError
Cleanup: Remove invited admin member after test

Title: Edit Member Role
Preconditions: Logged in as company Admin; at least one Buyer member exists
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in and log in as company Admin
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members
[ACT] Locate a member with 'Buyer' role
[ACT] Click Edit or role change option next to that member
[ACT] Change role from 'Buyer' to 'Admin'
[ACT] Save the change
[WAIT] Wait for member list to update
[ASSERT] Member role shows 'Admin' in list
[ASSERT] Affected member's permissions updated on next action
Assertions:
[DOM] Edit/role-change option available per member row
[DOM] Role selector shows available roles (Buyer; Admin)
[STATE] Saving updates the member's role in list immediately
[STATE] Changed member gains Admin permissions
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Role edit option missing; mutation returns errors[]; role not updated in list after save; permissions not updated; console TypeError
Cleanup: Revert member role to Buyer after test

Title: Block Member
Preconditions: Logged in as company Admin; at least one active Buyer member exists
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in and log in as company Admin
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members
[ACT] Locate an active Buyer member
[ACT] Click Block or Deactivate option for that member
[ACT] Confirm the block action in the dialog
[WAIT] Wait for status to update
[ASSERT] Member status shows 'Blocked' in list
[NAV] Attempt to log in as the blocked member on {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ASSERT] Login is rejected with blocked account error
Assertions:
[DOM] Block/Deactivate option available for non-Admin members
[DOM] Confirmation dialog appears before blocking
[STATE] After confirmation: member status changes to 'Blocked' in list
[DOM] Blocked member login error: 'Your account has been blocked. Contact your administrator.'
[STATE] Blocked member's existing sessions invalidated
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[NETWORK] POST /connect/token returns 4xx for blocked member
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Block option missing; mutation returns errors[]; member status not updated after block; blocked member can still log in; console TypeError
Cleanup: Unblock member after test to restore state

Title: Unblock Member
Preconditions: Logged in as company Admin; at least one Blocked member exists
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in and log in as company Admin
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members
[ACT] Locate a Blocked member
[ACT] Click Unblock or Activate option for that member
[ACT] Confirm the unblock action
[WAIT] Wait for status to update
[ASSERT] Member status returns to 'Active' in list
[NAV] Attempt to log in as the previously blocked member on {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ASSERT] Login succeeds
Assertions:
[DOM] Unblock/Activate option visible for Blocked members
[STATE] After unblock: member status returns to 'Active' in list
[STATE] Previously blocked member can now sign in successfully
[STATE] Member's data and history preserved after unblock
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[NETWORK] POST /connect/token returns HTTP 200 after unblock
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Unblock option missing; mutation returns errors[]; status not updated after unblock; member still cannot log in after unblock; console TypeError

Title: Filter Members by Role
Preconditions: Logged in as company Admin; member list has both Buyer and Admin members
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in and log in as company Admin
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members
[ACT] Locate role filter control (dropdown; tabs; or checkbox)
[ACT] Filter by role 'Buyer'
[ASSERT] Only Buyer members shown
[ACT] Filter by role 'Admin'
[ASSERT] Only Admin members shown
[ACT] Clear filter
[ASSERT] All members shown
Assertions:
[DOM] Role filter control present on Members page
[STATE] Filtering by 'Buyer' shows only Buyer members
[STATE] Filtering by 'Admin' shows only Admin members
[DOM] Member count updates to reflect applied filter
[STATE] Clearing filter restores full member list
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] Members endpoint returns filtered results
Failure_Signals: Filter control missing; filter has no effect on list; clearing filter fails to restore full list; console TypeError

Title: Search Members
Preconditions: Logged in as company Admin; at least 5 members with distinct names
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in and log in as company Admin
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members
[ACT] Locate search input field
[ACT] Type part of a member's name (at least 3 characters)
[WAIT] Wait for results to filter
[ASSERT] Member list updates dynamically to show matching results
[ACT] Clear search field
[ASSERT] Full member list restored
Assertions:
[DOM] Search input field present on Members page
[STATE] Typing filters member list dynamically (live or on Enter)
[STATE] Search matches on name and/or email
[DOM] No-results state shown if no members match
[STATE] Clearing search restores complete member list
Failure_Signals: Search input missing; search has no filtering effect; clearing search does not restore list; console TypeError
